$comment: Test-gate map for Air Action Sports. Maps do-not-touch source paths (per docs/audit/06-do-not-touch.md) to the test paths that lock their behavior. Rule: before editing any path under `gates`, run the listed test paths and confirm they pass. After your edit, re-run them — they must still pass. If a test reveals current behavior conflicting with audit-documented behavior, STOP and ask the operator. The `uncovered` section enumerates do-not-touch files without tests yet — their `audit_tests_prescribed` arrays form the post-M1 punch list per docs/audit/09-test-coverage.md. When adding tests for a gated path in a future batch, also append the new test paths to the relevant `gates[<path>].tests` array.

covers: GET /api/admin/bookings (list with rich filters: status, event_id, q, from, to, payment_method, has_refund, waiver_status, min_amount, max_amount, customer_id) — M4 B2b
GET /api/admin/bookings/:id (detail with customer card + activity log + PII masking + audit) — M4 B3a
POST /api/admin/bookings/:id/refund-external (5 methods, always-notify customer per D06) — M4 B3a

worker/lib/capabilities.js.audit_group: (M4 B3a — capability stub for the M3-era 3-role hierarchy; M5 will formalize)

covers: serveUpload (full — allowlist regex, MIME mapping, 404/500 paths, security headers)
rewriteEventOg (full — DB lookup, all 10 SEO meta selectors, fallback when event missing, slug parsing variants)
scheduled outer dispatch (full — cron-string branching, parallel sweep dispatch, error containment, always-on cron.swept audit row, ctx.waitUntil contract)
worker/index.js.audit_group: G (full), H (outer dispatch only — inner sweeps runReminderSweep/runAbandonPendingSweep/runVendorSweep remain uncovered, see uncovered.worker/index.js)

covers: GET /api/admin/today/active (activeEventToday / eventId / checkInOpen response shape — contract for B5 sidebar + B6 banner)
GET /api/admin/dashboard/upcoming-readiness (top-3 events with capacity + waiver pct — M4 B4d)
GET /api/admin/dashboard/action-queue (4-count aggregate for owner triage — M4 B4d)
worker/routes/admin/dashboard.js.audit_group: (M4 B4b persona dashboard foundation; B4d owner extension)

covers: GET /api/admin/analytics/overview (?event_id + ?period=mtd query params — M4 B4d added MTD scoping for the RevenueSummary widget)
GET /api/admin/analytics/funnel (?days N-day checkout funnel: Created -> Paid -> Waivers -> Checked in — M4 B4e powers the ConversionFunnel widget)
worker/routes/admin/analytics.js.audit_group: (M4 B4d owner persona MTD revenue scoping; B4e marketing persona funnel)

covers: intervalForTier (cadence rule: 5min default / 30s on event day / 10s during check-in)
PERSONA_LAYOUTS registry (6 persona enum values per migration 0028 + decision D08)
resolveLayout (read user.persona; alias-only personas fall back to roleDerivedDefault)
personaLabel (display name for all 6 personas + legacy role compat)

SIDEBAR registry (Surface 1 IA per docs/m4-discovery/sidebar-ia-audit.md — Home / Today / Events / Bookings / Customers / Rentals / Roster / Scan / Settings group with 10 sub-items; Rentals/Roster/Scan restored to standing nav per M5 B0 D10)
getVisibleItems (filters by dynamic todayActive + requiresFlag + capability predicates)
userHasCapabilityStub (M5 B0 stub mapping capability → minimum legacy role; M5 B2 swaps to DB-backed check)
loadSidebarExpand / saveSidebarExpand (localStorage helpers for Settings group expand state; namespaced aas:admin:sidebar:expand:*)
src/admin/sidebarConfig.js.audit_group: (M4 B5 sidebar IA reorganization; M5 B0 D10 capability-gated standing nav)

covers: pickRecallableBookings (filter customer history to most recent N paid/comp; tolerates camelCase + snake_case timestamp keys)
formatRelativeAge (just now / minutes / hours / days / weeks / months / years)
commandsFromSidebar (derive flat command list from SIDEBAR; honors getVisibleItems predicates for dynamic todayActive + requiresFlag)
filterCommands (case-insensitive substring match; prefix-priority sort; defensive against non-array/non-string-label inputs)

worker/routes/bookings.js.status: no dedicated tests; quote pricing covered indirectly via Group A

covers: runReminderSweep inner behavior (sentinel-first idempotency, 24hr/1hr window math, batch parallelism, send/rollback)
runVendorSweep inner behavior (COI 30d/7d, package reminder, signature reminder windows + sentinels)
worker/index.js.status: Group G outer dispatch covered M4 B1a; H deferred to M5 per docs/runbooks/m3-baseline-coverage.txt + M4 milestone plan

covers: the 9 named senders (booking_confirmation, admin_notify, waiver_request, etc.)
worker/lib/emailSender.js.status: no dedicated tests; covered indirectly via tests/unit/webhook/email-send-confirmation.test.js + email-send-admin-notify.test.js

worker/lib/formatters.js.status: no dedicated tests; covered indirectly via webhook fixture's event lookup
